overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic sci-fi city (New Atlantis from Starfield), following a yellow transit rover along a paved approach road before entering a covered transit hub with prominent United Colonies signage. The environment features sleek white architecture, glass canopies, and rocky outcrops under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city approach road with transit vehicle

events.description: yellow transit rover turns left and exits the frame while camera continues straight

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the paved road following the yellow rover toward the city entrance

notable_agents.action: yellow and white transit rover driving ahead then turning left to exit the roadway

entered.detail: large white angular building with red chevron accents and multiple tiers
steep rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation rising beside the roadway
futuristic six-wheeled vehicle with yellow and white coloring and green accents
large curved glass and metal structure marking the city entrance
multi-level highway structure with white railings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide approach road to a futuristic city, with a large civic building dominating the center background and rocky hills to the left. The camera follows a yellow transit rover moving along the asphalt road toward a glass-canopied entrance structure. The environment is brightly lit by natural sunlight with clear skies, and a few distant pedestrians are visible near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approach to the transit hub entrance

events.description: approaching the semi-covered entrance area with glass canopy becoming prominent overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the road toward the covered entrance after the vehicle has exited

entered.detail: elevated walkway structure with blue 'ARRIVALS' signage and security screening notices

segments.scene_description: Having passed the transit rover, the camera continues across the open plaza toward the city entrance. The large civic building now dominates the left side while the glass canopy structure looms ahead. The arrivals signage becomes visible on an elevated walkway to the left, and the road surface shows marked pedestrian crossings as the environment transitions toward the covered entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit hub entrance with security screening

events.description: entering the shadow of the glass and metal canopy, creating dappled light patterns
passing under the 'NEW ATLANTIS' signage into the official United Colonies transit area

agents.ego_description: walking through the security checkpoint area into the covered New Atlantis transit hub

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the security checkpoint area ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large wall-mounted sign reading 'WELCOME TO NEW ATLANTIS CAPITAL OF THE UNITED COLONIES EST 2161'
geometric glass and metal lattice roof structure allowing filtered sunlight through
futuristic screening stations with blue lighting and UC security markings

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered transit hub beneath a geometric glass canopy, where the lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial. The prominent 'NEW ATLANTIS' sign dominates the left wall, identifying the location as the United Colonies capital. Security checkpoint booths line the right side as the camera proceeds through the entrance plaza toward the interior of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched approach road into the sheltered interior of a futuristic transit hub. It begins by trailing a yellow transit rover along an asphalt road, with rocky hills to the left and a massive civic building anchoring the distant horizon under a clear sky. As the camera passes the rover, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the civic building shifts to the left and the glass-canopied entrance looms ahead, revealing pedestrian crossings and arrivals signage on an elevated walkway. The movement then carries the viewer beneath the geometric glass canopy, where the bright natural light blends with artificial illumination. Finally, the camera proceeds through the entrance plaza past security checkpoint booths, passing a prominent New Atlantis sign that identifies the facility as the United Colonies capital.
